g.text: Interactive workshop for data, LLMs, CV, RAG, and fine-tuning
25 browsable resources wired into a full-screen Textual workspace.
Browse the curriculum, launch notebooks and scripts, and run a repo health check without leaving the terminal.
for navigating the workshop like a local product, not a loose pile of files.
for notebooks and scripts so you can jump from reading to doing.
for quick checks before demos or workshops.
